sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n241" key="a)gaqodaimone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγαθο-δαιμονέω</orth>, Astrol., <sense id="n241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">occupy the house of</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀγαθοδαίμων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2023.tlg004:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:62:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">62.20</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">O.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl>:</sense> </entryFree>
